title: Lorecraft Tutorial: The World That Notices

text: This demo teaches the core loop: choices change state, and state changes what choices you can take.

text.text: WEALTH is your decision profile. HP is your survival meter.
Tip: Inventory uses StoryLogic. Items only do something when a scene allows it.

text: A corridor stretches in both directions. The walls are scabbed with old paint and polite warnings.

text.text: This tutorial keeps penalties light. When HP changes, you’ll see an explicit system line.

choices.text: Go left, toward the darker end of the hallway.
Go right, toward a door that reads: ARCHIVE.

text: The corridor is darker here. The light fixtures buzz without committing to illumination.
A hazard waits ahead—hard to see, easy to regret.

text.text: A warning: pushing forward recklessly can kill you in VerseCraft.
Item Moment: Open Inventory → Special → Use Candle.

lines.text: You light the candle. Shadows retreat—just enough to reveal the danger.
You apply the salve carefully. HP +2.
You slam into the hazard in the dark. HP -2.

choices.text: Back away and return to the brighter hall.

text: The ARCHIVE door opens with a tired sigh.
Inside: shelves, boxes, labels that look correct until you try to read them.

text.text: Tutorial rule: stats don’t increase here. Progress comes later via XP + leveling.

text: You reach a narrow junction. The floor dips like a question mark.

text.text: This is the “aha”: the world reacts to your actions and loadout instantly.

choices.text: Retreat and try the ARCHIVE door instead.

text: A single line is underlined twice:

text.text: WEALTH helps you choose. HP helps you survive.

text: A small chamber waits with the patience of a trap that prefers consent.
In the center: a metal bowl with something blackened inside.

text.text: Next: a tiny, fair penalty to demonstrate danger + feedback.

text: The air tightens. A sting flashes across your palm—fast and rude.

text.text: This is a danger event. HP will change and you’ll see it explained.

text: You retreat. The sting fades into a warning ache.

text.text: Failure is expected. The system tells you exactly what happened.

text: You grit your teeth and reach in.
Whatever bites you decides you’re not worth the effort.
Your fingers close on something small and warm at the edges.
A narrow exit opens where there wasn’t one before.

text.text: Demo goal: reach a clean end screen and prove Save/Load works.

text: You step into a quiet hall where the lighting finally behaves.
A sign reads: THANK YOU FOR NOTICING.

text.text: Now try: Save → refresh page → Continue → Load.
